idea-plugin.name: RemarkMD for JetBrains
idea-plugin.description: Google-Docs-style commenting for Markdown, where the other reviewer is Claude. Open a .md file, select a passage in the rendered preview, and leave a comment. Comments are stored inside the file itself, as YAML front matter under an mdreview key, anchored to a [^cN] footnote marker in the prose. The file is both the database and the handoff protocol.
